prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document provides statistics and information that pertain specifically to prison custody in England and Wales, focusing on deaths, self-harm, and assaults in those jurisdictions. It does not mention or include any information relevant to Scotland's prison system, which operates under different regulations and oversight.
